query: SELECT qb.id, qb.quotationItemId, qb.variantId, qb.quantity, qb.grossWeight, qb.cbm, pv.grossWeight as variantGrossWeight, pv.cbm as variantCbm FROM quotation_batches qb LEFT JOIN product_variants pv ON qb.variantId = pv.id LIMIT 10;
